en._note: Fill empty strings (""). Keep {placeholders} like {n}, {name}, {loc} unchanged. Keys starting with btn are button labels.
en.welcome:
Welcome to Notations '26 ✨
It's your companion for the Laboratory & Festival
en.startHint: Tap the button below to start 🌿
en.unknownCmd:
Hmm, I don’t know this command 👀
Try /start
en.stale:
This button feels a little ancient 🌚
Open /start again.
en.dbError:
Oops, something went wrong 🌙
Try again with /start.
en.accessDenied: This part of the bot is only open to the hosq team 🌙
en.regMatchWrong:
No worries 🌿
Let’s find the right profile.
en.regPickNamePrompt: Choose your name from the list below.
en.regSearchPrompt: Type your real or artistic name, so we can find you in the Notations database 🙂
en.regSearchNoResults:
I couldn’t find that name 💔
Try another spelling — or tap the button below.
en.regNoMatches:
I couldn’t find that name 💔
Try another spelling — or tap the button below.
en.regNotFoundFinal:
I can’t find you in the Notations database 💔
Please write to Uliana: @junully
en.regAlreadyLinked:
This profile is already linked to another Telegram account 🥺
Please contact Uliana: @junully
en.infoBody:
Notations brings together sound, performance, strange experiments, collective practices, and unexpected collaborations 🌿

Use the menu to explore the program, find collaborators, and stay in sync ✨
en.pickEvent: What would you like to explore? 🧚
en.dayBrowsePrompt: How would you like to explore this day? 🧚
en.nowEmpty: Nothing is happening right now (or it's out of schedule 🙈)
en.venuesBody:
Here are the spaces where Notations is happening 🌿
Open a venue to see its address and location.
en.scheduleChangedNotify:
A small change in the schedule
Please check the updated event details.
en.eventCancelledNotify:
This event has been cancelled 🌙
Please check your schedule for the latest updates.
en.profileEmpty: Your profile is still a little empty 🌱
en.profileEditPrompt: Tell us what you’d like to update in your profile.
en.profileEditSentToAdmin:
Thank you ✨
Your update request has been sent to the Notations team.
en.collabPrompt: Who or what are you looking for today? 🌿
en.collabNamePrompt: Type a real or artistic name 👀
en.collabNoResults:
No matches yet 🌙
Try changing your filters.
en.collabPickFilterType: What would you like to search by?
en.similarEmpty: We need a few more details in your profile before we can find similar people 🌱
en.needProfileForSimilar: Add disciplines, tools, projects, or skills to your profile so we can find better matches 🌿
en.circleRequestBody:
A small moment from your day 👀
Record a short Telegram video circle showing where you are, what you’re doing, or what is happening around you.
en.circleReceivedOk:
Got it ✨
Your circle has arrived safely.
en.circleWrongType: Please send this one as a Telegram video circle 🎥
en.circleNoActiveRequest: There’s no active circle request right now 🌙
en.circleReminder:
A gentle reminder 🌿
Your Notations circle is still waiting for you.
en.qotdBody: A small question for reflection, play, or wandering 🌿
en.qotdPromptVoice: Reply with a Telegram voice message when you’re ready ✨
en.qotdReceivedOk:
Thank you ✨
Your voice response has arrived.
en.qotdWrongType: Please answer with a Telegram voice message 🎙️
en.qotdNoActive: There’s no active question right now 🌙
en.qotdReminder:
A gentle reminder 🌿
Today’s question is still waiting for your voice.
en.adminApprovalPrompt: Would you like to approve this profile link?
en.adminCircleRandomCountPrompt: How many random participants should receive this request?
en.adminQAddPrompt: Send the new question as a text message.
en.adminQLibraryEmpty: The question library is still empty 🌱
en.adminBroadcastComposePrompt: Send the message or media you’d like to share 🌿
en.adminBroadcastAlreadySent: This notification has already been sent 🌙
en.adminStatsBody: A small overview of what is happening across the bot 🌿
en.adminSettingsBody: Manage the main Notations bot settings here 🌿
en.adminAddAdminUsernamePrompt: Send their Telegram username (with or without @)
en.adminAddAdminExists: This admin is already on the list 🌙
en.adminAddAdminNeedStart:
Saved ✨
They need to open the bot once (/start) before admin access works.
en.adminRemoveAdminForbidden: You can’t remove the primary admin 🌙
en.adminWhoHasAccessEmpty: No one has admin access right now 🌙
en.regNoMatches:
I couldn’t find that name 💔
Try another spelling — or tap the button below.
